original_final_question: I want to study the demographic in NYC. Can you find me the zip code of the NYC high school that was in the top 3 by overall progress score in the school year 2011-13 and had an A grade in the 2010-11 progress. Report the percentage of White people contributing to the racial makeup of the neighborhood whose primary ZIP code is the same as that high school based on data in 2010 census?. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
reasoning_chain_text:
1. Which NYC high schools were in the top 3 by overall score in 2011-12?
2. Which NYC high schools were in the top 3 by overall score in 2012-13?
3. Which schools from <intersection of node_1, node_2> had an A grade in the 2010-11 Progress Report?
4. What is the ZIP code of <node_3 answer>?
5. What percentage does White people contribute to the racial makeup of the neighborhood whose primary ZIP code is <node_4 answer> based on data in 2010 census?
original_reasoning_chain: HOP 1 (d=2, NYC high school top-3 overall score - nodes 1-2):
Node 1 (2011-12): Top 3 -> {It Takes a Village Academy, Academy for Careers in Television and Film, Manhattan Village Academy}
Node 2 (2012-13): Top 3 -> {It Takes a Village Academy, Academy for Careers in Television and Film, Brooklyn International High School}
Intersection(1,2) -> {It Takes a Village Academy, Academy for Careers in Television and Film}
HOP 2 (d=1, school grades - node 3 depends on hop 1):
Node 3: From the intersection, the school with an A grade in 2010-11 -> It Takes a Village Academy
HOP 3 (d=1, school locations - node 4 depends on node 3):
Node 4: ZIP code of It Takes a Village Academy -> 11203
HOP 4 (d=1, neighborhood demographics - node 5 depends on node 4):
Node 5: White population share for the neighborhood with primary ZIP 11203 -> 1.3%
